problem id: 3aec6985
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  10011111 -> 11110011
  11000111 -> 11111011
  11110010 -> 01011111
  11111111 -> 11111111
  10010111 -> 11110010
  01010001 -> 00101011
  01011010 -> 01001011
  01100110 -> 11001101
  00110100 -> 10000110
  01110010 -> 01001111

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 01000100
